name: Remoulade with Vegetable Crudites
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine mustard, oil, catsup, vinegar, and Tabasco sauce in a bowl.
2. Add the finely chopped celery, onion, and green pepper to the mixture.
3. Stir in the cherry tomatoes, mushroom slices, cucumber slices, celery slices, and carrot slices.
4. Cover and chill the remoulade until ready to serve.
5. Serve the dip with whole vegetables and sliced vegetables.
